name: Deepset

when_to_use: Building production RAG pipelines with Haystack framework
Deploying document QA systems over enterprise knowledge bases
Running hybrid BM25 + vector search for accurate retrieval

pros: Haystack is a proven OSS RAG framework
review.verdict: Good pick for enterprise RAG teams that already lean on Haystack internally.

review.not_for: Teams wanting a hosted RAG API without framework investment
